gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/22)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/22)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَنْكِحُوا الْأَكْفَاءَ وَ انْكِحُوا فِيهِمْ وَ اخْتَارُوا لِنُطَفِكُمْ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Marry the matches and marry among them, and choose for your seed’.
en.sarwar: 3. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Get married but the party must be a proper match, so marry from them (proper matches) and choose (proper environment) for your seeds.’”
